name: Stats Row — Clinical Trial Key Metrics Dashboard
input: Display key metrics from a completed clinical trial: 1,247 Participants Enrolled, 94.2% Retention Rate, p < 0.001 Primary Endpoint, 23% Relative Risk Reduction, 12 Study Sites, 36 Months Duration.
qualityCriteria: Value for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
Stat cards with large values displayed
napkinBenchmark: Horizontal row of 6 stat cards, each with a large number and short label. Consistent card sizing and subtle background color.

data.title: Phase III Clinical Trial Results
data.caption: Summary statistics from the completed Phase III randomized controlled trial
